calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Ownership Of Real Property
Off Calendar Nov-04-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kathleen Michon and Brandi Chavin, via Zoom, for Jonathan Alba, Petitioner.

The court advises that it is in the position to confirm 10% of the Trust's interest in the real property but it appears that the court would not be able to establish the other 40%. Counsel offers advocacy on behalf of the petition and the request that the court order confirming the trust's interest in the real property but also the other parties' interest in the same and that the matter should have been an Estate matter but that the petition was filed as a Trust matter at the suggestion of court staff. The court suggests that counsel consider filing an amended petition to confirm the entire 50% to the trust and each trustee could then transfer their individual interests. Ms. Chavin reports that they could do as the court suggests and suggests the court consider bifurcation instead. In additional advocacy for the instant petition, Ms. Michon reports that joinders were recently filed, that there is no dispute regarding ownership and mentions probate code 855.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Ownership Of Real Property
Off Calendar Sep-14-2022 Continued To Oct-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
